name: ChkStart_LINRespToleranceViolation
title: ChkStart_LINRespToleranceViolation
syntax: dword ChkStart_LINRespToleranceViolation (Message Frame, float Tolerance, char[] CaplCallback);
dword ChkStart_LINRespToleranceViolation (Node ObservedNode, float Tolerance, char[] CaplCallback);
description: Checks the LIN response transmission time.
An event will be generated, if the measured response transmission time is over allowed tolerance.

parameters.name: ObservedNode
parameters.description: Node, whose published frames shall be verified.

parameters.name: CaplCallback
parameters.description: Name of CAPL callback function to be called on generated event. In simulation nodes this parameter has to be set. In test modules this parameter is optional.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
